description_long: This is a medium-sized, fixed-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic passenger aircraft design. The body is primarily white with blue accents, featuring a rounded nose and a cockpit with multiple windows. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, with visible engines attached beneath them. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer with a blue stripe and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose wheel. The overall appearance suggests a commercial or transport aircraft, suitable for carrying passengers or cargo.
description: A white and blue passenger airplane with low-mounted straight wings, a single vertical tail, and a streamlined fuselage. It features a tricycle landing gear and multiple cockpit windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and both wings with visible engines beneath them.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the fuselage length, window row, and the left wing with its engine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the back of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right wing, engine, and the blue-striped tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
